title: Aviator Dreams (Reloaded)
description: Addon for Immersive aircraft that adds real life planes from small to big. Fork of Aviator Dreams.
body: # What is Aviator Dreams (Reloaded)? Well, it is a fork of [Aviator Dreams](https://modrinth.com/mod/aviator-dreams) [(by Nax)](https://modrinth.com/user/Nasuka_Sensei) which adds improvements and fixes to the original mod and is made for newer versions. The original mod, Aviator Dreams is an addon for [Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft) which adds real life planes (and vehicles). # Improvements * Improved statistics for the Dehavilland DH-106 Comet 1 * Lowered volume of all sounds * Improved Fabric support ...and more to come # Fixes * The game no longer crashes when the Toyota Stout K100 is placed * The game no longer crashes when the Test Entity is placed * Fixed crash with Immersive Aircraft 1.3.0+ on Fabric # Theme Aviator Dreams (Reloaded) is aimed at improving and continuing Aviator Dreams. Aviator Dreams is aimed at adding real life planes to the game. Aircraft included (so far) : * Dehavilland DH-106 Comet 1 * Douglas DC-1 * Douglas DC-2 * Douglas C-47 * Fokker F.VIIA * Fokker F.VIIB-3M * Lockheed L-1049G Super Constellation * Toyota Stout K100 # Credits * CerealCamera - Ported to Immersive Aircraft 1.3.0 and NeoForge, fixes and improvements * [Nax](https://modrinth.com/user/Nasuka_Sensei) - Models and Textures * Hashim - Fokker F.VII(F7) Texture * [Bomb787](https://github.com/Bomb787) - Forge cleanup and registry fix * [Luke100000/Conczin](https://modrinth.com/user/Luke100000) - Provided a useful template for add-on creation and helped Nax set up the orginal project troubleshoot it
